Welcome to the Future of DriftDRIFT is a governance token powering the Drift ecosystem.

What is DRIFT?DRIFT is the first step on Drift’s decentralization journey — empowering users to become true stewards of the protocol. Holders have the opportunity to make key decisions that influence and shape the future of Drift so that it continues to serve traders and the needs of the broader DeFi ecosystem.Read the announcement
